title: Restrict Barcode Scanning to PDF417 and Code 128 Only
description:
Configure bcWebCam so that ONLY two barcode types are enabled for scanning: PDF417 and Code 128. All other barcode types must be disabled.

Specifically:
- Enable Code 128 (a 1D/linear barcode symbology)
- Enable PDF417 (a 2D stacked barcode symbology)
- Disable ALL other barcode types including: QR Code, DataMatrix, Aztec, EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC-A, UPC-E, Code 39, Codabar, ITF/Interleaved 2 of 5, and any others

Open the bcWebCam barcode type settings, systematically uncheck every barcode type except Code 128 and PDF417, then save/apply the settings.

Context: This configuration is needed for a logistics receiving station where only shipping labels (Code 128) and driver's license barcodes (PDF417) should be scanned during delivery verification.
